name: Creator Setup
description: A starter creator workflow for recording, editing, audio cleanup, and media processing.

apps.reason: Core screen recording and streaming tool.
General media conversion and processing toolkit.
Recommended for more advanced video editing workflows.
Useful for audio recording and cleanup.
Useful for quick social video editing workflows.

config_recommendations: Keep recording output and editing cache on a disk with enough free space.
Use hardware encoding when available and stable.
Test one short recording before important capture sessions.
risk_warnings: High-bitrate recording can fill disks quickly.
4K editing can be slow on systems with limited RAM or VRAM.
not_recommended: 4K multi-layer editing on systems below 16GB RAM.
next_steps: Pick a recording resolution and codec target.
Install creator tools manually from official sources.
Run a short recording and playback test.
